title: Resolve circular dependencies in classes
description: Circular dependencies between classes in the same package make code harder to maintain and test. Breaking these cycles improves modularity and reduces the risk of unintended side effects. Refactor code to eliminate direct or indirect cycles among classes.
recommendation: Refactor classes to remove circular dependencies, using interfaces or design changes to decouple related classes.

checks.message: Refactor classes to remove circular dependencies, using interfaces or design changes to decouple related classes.
